description_long: This is a classic grand piano with a glossy black finish and a curved right side, typical of concert grand designs. The piano features a full keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and three sturdy legs supporting its body. The lid is fully closed, giving the instrument a sleek, monolithic appearance, and the pedals are visible beneath the keyboard. The piano's surface is smooth and reflective, with subtle metallic accents along the edges. No visible brand or logo is present, and there is no music stand attached to the top.
description: A glossy black grand piano with a closed lid, full keyboard, and three visible pedals. The surface is smooth and reflective, with no visible brand or music stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, three pedals, and the piano's curved lid.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the piano's curved right side and the closed lid, with pedals visible underneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back and the elegant curve of the piano's body, with no keyboard or pedals visible.
description_view_3: Side view showing the length of the piano, the closed lid, and the legs, with the keyboard partially visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard grand piano keyboard with 88 keys, alternating white and black keys in a traditional arrangement.
